001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity;
002
003import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnore;
004import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnoreProperties;
005import jakarta.persistence.CascadeType;
006import jakarta.persistence.Column;
007import jakarta.persistence.Entity;
008import jakarta.persistence.FetchType;
009import jakarta.persistence.GeneratedValue;
010import jakarta.persistence.GenerationType;
011import jakarta.persistence.Id;
012import jakarta.persistence.Index;
013import jakarta.persistence.JoinColumn;
014import jakarta.persistence.JoinTable;
015import jakarta.persistence.ManyToMany;
016import jakarta.persistence.ManyToOne;
017import jakarta.persistence.OneToMany;
018import jakarta.persistence.OneToOne;
019import jakarta.persistence.OrderBy;
020import jakarta.persistence.PrePersist;
021import jakarta.persistence.Table;
022import jakarta.persistence.UniqueConstraint;
023import java.time.Instant;
024import java.util.LinkedList;
025import java.util.List;
026import java.util.UUID;
027import org.hibernate.annotations.CreationTimestamp;
028import org.hibernate.annotations.UpdateTimestamp;
029
030/**
031 * JPA entity representing a user-submitted issue report, including location, status, and images.
032 */
033@Entity
034@Table(
035  name = "issue_report",
036  uniqueConstraints = {
037    @UniqueConstraint(name = "uk_issue_report_report_location_id", columnNames = "report_location_id")
038  },
039  indexes = {
040    @Index(name = "ix_issue_report_user_profile_id", columnList = "user_profile_id"),
041    @Index(name = "ix_issue_report_accepted_state_id", columnList = "accepted_state_id"),
042    @Index(name = "ix_issue_report_time_first_reported", columnList = "time_first_reported"),
043    @Index(name = "ix_issue_report_time_last_modified", columnList = "time_last_modified")
044  }
045)
046public class IssueReport {
047
048  @Id
049  @Column(name = "issue_report_id", updatable = false)
050  @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)
051  @JsonIgnore
052  private Long id;
053
054  @Column(name = "issue_report_external_id", updatable = false)
055  private UUID externalId;
056
057  @ManyToOne(fetch = FetchType.LAZY, optional = false)
058  @JoinColumn(name = "user_profile_id", nullable = false, updatable = false)
059  private UserProfile userProfile;
060
061  // TODO: 3/26/2026 Revisit cascade strategy for reportLocation (ALL vs PERSIST/MERGE/REMOVE). 
062  @OneToOne(fetch = FetchType.EAGER, optional = false, cascade = CascadeType.ALL)
063  @JoinColumn(name = "report_location_id", nullable = false)
064  private ReportLocation reportLocation;
065
066  @ManyToOne(fetch = FetchType.EAGER, optional = false)
067  @JoinColumn(name = "accepted_state_id", nullable = false)
068  private AcceptedState acceptedState;
069
070  // used AI to help with JoinTable annotation
071  @ManyToMany(fetch = FetchType.EAGER)
072  @JoinTable(
073    name = "issue_report_issue_type",
074    joinColumns = @JoinColumn(
075      name = "issue_report_id",
076      nullable = false
077    ),
078    inverseJoinColumns = @JoinColumn(
079      name = "issue_type_id",
080      nullable = false
081    )
082  )
083  private final List<IssueType> issueTypes = new LinkedList<>();
084
085  @CreationTimestamp
086  @Column(nullable = false, updatable = false)
087  private Instant timeFirstReported;
088
089  @UpdateTimestamp
090  @Column(nullable = false)
091  private Instant timeLastModified;
092
093  @Column(nullable = false)
094  private String textDescription; // User explanation of issue
095
096  // used AI to help with OneToMany annotation
097  @OneToMany(mappedBy = "issueReport", fetch = FetchType.EAGER)
098  @OrderBy("albumOrder DESC")
099  private final List<ReportImage> reportImages = new LinkedList<>();
100
101  /**
102   * Returns the database identifier for this report.
103   *
104   * @return primary key value.
105   */
106  public Long getId() {
107    return id;
108  }
109
110  /**
111   * Returns the external identifier for this report.
112   *
113   * @return external ID.
114   */
115  public UUID getExternalId() {
116    return externalId;
117  }
118
119  /**
120   * Returns the user profile that created this report.
121   *
122   * @return user profile.
123   */
124  public UserProfile getUserProfile() {
125    return userProfile;
126  }
127
128  /**
129   * Sets the user profile that created this report.
130   *
131   * @param userProfile user profile.
132   */
133  public void setUserProfile(UserProfile userProfile) {
134    this.userProfile = userProfile;
135  }
136
137  /**
138   * Returns the report location.
139   *
140   * @return report location.
141   */
142  public ReportLocation getReportLocation() {
143    return reportLocation;
144  }
145
146  /**
147   * Sets the report location.
148   *
149   * @param reportLocation report location.
150   */
151  public void setReportLocation(ReportLocation reportLocation) {
152    this.reportLocation = reportLocation;
153  }
154
155  /**
156   * Returns the accepted-state/status of this report.
157   *
158   * @return accepted state.
159   */
160  public AcceptedState getAcceptedState() {
161    return acceptedState;
162  }
163
164  /**
165   * Sets the accepted-state/status of this report.
166   *
167   * @param acceptedState accepted state.
168   */
169  public void setAcceptedState(AcceptedState acceptedState) {
170    this.acceptedState = acceptedState;
171  }
172
173  /**
174   * Returns the issue types associated with this report.
175   *
176   * @return associated issue types.
177   */
178  public List<IssueType> getIssueTypes() {
179    return issueTypes;
180  }
181
182  /**
183   * Returns the time the report was first persisted.
184   *
185   * @return first-reported timestamp.
186   */
187  public Instant getTimeFirstReported() {
188    return timeFirstReported;
189  }
190
191  /**
192   * Returns the time the report was last modified.
193   *
194   * @return last-modified timestamp.
195   */
196  public Instant getTimeLastModified() {
197    return timeLastModified;
198  }
199
200  /**
201   * Returns the user-supplied issue description.
202   *
203   * @return description text.
204   */
205  public String getTextDescription() {
206    return textDescription;
207  }
208
209  /**
210   * Sets the user-supplied issue description.
211   *
212   * @param textDescription description text.
213   */
214  public void setTextDescription(String textDescription) {
215    this.textDescription = textDescription;
216  }
217
218  /**
219   * Returns the images associated with this report.
220   *
221   * @return associated images.
222   */
223  public List<ReportImage> getReportImages() {
224    return reportImages;
225  }
226
227  @PrePersist
228  void onCreate() {
229    this.externalId = UUID.randomUUID();
230  }
231}
232
